title: Aphorisms
content:
Aphorisms

A well-placed aphorism can often be more educational and memorable than hours of lectures and presentations. Moreover, it builds bridges from today to tomorrow.

As Üsküdar University, in order to serve the transfer of our human values and culture from generations to generations, we share with the public the aphorisms in which our Founding Rector and Chairman of the Board of Directors Prof. Dr. Nevzat Tarhan conveys the thoughts and opinions of our esteemed academicians and scientists in order to meet in the common values of both today and tomorrow.
